case_title: SPECK CAB CO DBA ARROW CAB CO VS ATHANASIOS, PASHALIS

docket_entries.description: ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER DATED MAY 27, 2008. "COURT ORDERED THE PARTIES TO GO TO COURT IF THEY WANT TO BE HEARD".

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB CO DBA ARROW CAB CO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ATHANASIOS, PASHALIS $939.03 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,009.03, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $3756.13, AND ATTRIBUTES 25% COMPARATIVE NEGLIGENCE TO PLAINTIFF.THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLFT. COPIES MAILED TO ALL PARTIES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB CO DBA ARROW CAB CO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ATHANASIOS, PASHALIS $2,817.10 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,887.10, JUDGMENT IS AMENDED AND CORRECTED TO STATE THAT PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER DAMAGES IN THE (NET) SUM OF $2,817.10, PLUS COSTS IN THE SUM OF $70.00. THE COURT MADE MATHEMATICAL ERROR WHEN IT ORIGINALLY ENTERED JUDGEMNT ON OCTOBER 1, 2008. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
THE COURT ORDER DATED MAY 27, 2008. OF JUN-26-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR - DUPLICATE ENTRY. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ATHANASIOS, PASHALIS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPECK CAB CO DBA ARROW CAB CO
